items.title: Live Updates: U.S. to Resume Shipping Blockade on Iran
items.summary: President Trump also said the United States would charge a 20 percent fee on goods passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Ukraine and allies launch coalition to tackle Russia’s ballistic missiles
items.summary: Russia has escalated attacks in recent weeks, taking advantage of Ukraine’s critical shortage of air defences.

items.title: Hungary parliament votes to remove president from office
items.summary: Tamás Sulyok was widely seen as a loyalist of former prime minister Viktor Orbán, who lost power in April after 16 years.
